name: Danish Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat together egg, sugar, vanilla, and melted butter (up to 3 tablespoons).
3. Stir in sifted flour, salt, and baking powder.
4. Add chopped apple, nuts, cinnamon, and nutmeg; mix well.
5. Pour into a greased pie plate.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
